channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Bruce Springsteen’s Merch Partner Sues to Stop Tour Knockoffs in New Jersey
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the latest update on the music scene. If you're a fan of Bruce Springsteen, you might want to know that the official merch supplier for the Boss and the E Street Band is taking action against counterfeiters.
[Music transitions to a brief clip of a Springsteen song]
Host: Merch Traffic, a Live Nation subsidiary, has filed a lawsuit alleging that bootleggers have been selling fake Springsteen merchandise outside tour venues since the start of the Land of Hopes and Dreams tour. The company is seeking a nationwide injunction to stop the sale of these counterfeit items, starting with the upcoming show in New Jersey on April 20th.
[Music transitions back to the host]
Host: According to the lawsuit, the counterfeiters have been selling low-quality, underpriced knockoffs of official Springsteen t-shirts and hats. Merch Traffic wants to seize these infringing products and is asking the court to grant an injunction that would last through the end of the tour in May.
[Music plays softly in the background]
Host: This isn't the first time Merch Traffic has taken action against counterfeiters. Similar lawsuits have been filed in the past for other major artists, including Tate McRae, Dua Lipa, and Benson Boone. In fact, injunctions were put in place for two prior Springsteen tours in 2016 and 2023.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's the latest update from the music world. If you're planning to attend a Springsteen show, be sure to buy your merchandise from authorized sellers to avoid supporting counterfeiters. Thanks for tuning in! [Outro music continues to play until the end]
